details.test: Task 1: Shortlist 3 brand commercials under 60 seconds (adapted to available data)
Task 2: Start project inquiry for cheaper of two long-form projects (adapted to commercials)
Task 3: Request quote for cheapest music video package under $25,000 with 2 shooting days
Task 4: Open New York project and subscribe to newsletter from its page (adapted)
Task 5: Save and copy link for recent Behind the Scenes cinematography article
Task 6: Shortlist tech client projects and send contact message referencing clients
Task 7: Apply for Los Angeles Production Coordinator role
Task 8: Create custom reel with multiple projects and generate shareable link (adapted to available projects)
Task 9: Estimate branded content project and schedule intro call
